hero.subtitle: BibleBot knows the Bible – and asks the right questions. Not a person, but an honest companion. For meaningful conversations, deep questions, and real impulses.
hero.quote: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest."

features.sectionSubtitle: Discover the many ways BibleBot can walk alongside you

bible.title: Bible passages & interpretation
bible.desc: Ask "What does the Bible say about...?" and receive relevant verses with context and clear explanation.

goals.title: Life planning & goals
goals.desc: Discover your calling, set concrete goals, and find out what God might have in store for you.

self.title: Finding yourself
self.desc: Recognize your gifts, strengths, and longings – and what your heart truly needs.

faith.title: Faith journey & finding Christ
faith.desc: Whether seeking, doubting, or deepening – BibleBot accompanies you on your personal path.

daily.title: Daily impulses & church year
daily.desc: Start your day with impulses and let BibleBot guide you through Advent, Lent, and holidays.

groups.title: Groups & communities
groups.desc: Perfect for Bible study groups, church communities, and shared devotions.

coaching.title: Not just a chatbot – genuine companionship
coaching.subtitle: BibleBot combines biblical wisdom with proven coaching methods and Positive Psychology.
coaching.journeyDesc: BibleBot accompanies you as long as you wish – in free conversation or with an optional 21-day structure.
coaching.week1Desc: Building trust, listening, understanding your situation. Where are you? What concerns you?
coaching.week2Desc: Recognizing patterns, clarifying desires, deepening biblical impulses. What do you really want?
coaching.week3Desc: Taking concrete steps, setting goals, initiating change. What's your next step?
coaching.openQuestionsTitle: Open questions instead of quick answers
coaching.openQuestionsDesc: BibleBot doesn't give cheap advice. Instead, it asks the questions that truly matter:
coaching.openQ2: "How would you know something has changed?"
coaching.openQ3: "What would be a first small step?"
coaching.honestDesc: No "It'll be fine!" and no sugarcoating. BibleBot is empathetic AND honest:
coaching.renameTip: 💡 You can give your BibleBot a personal name – so it truly becomes your companion.

discover.title: Rediscover faith – without pressure
discover.subtitle: More and more people are asking the big questions anew. BibleBot.Life is for everyone who wants to (re)discover faith – honestly, without pathos, and without church jargon.

doubt.title: You doubt?
doubt.text: Good. Doubt isn't a flaw – it's the beginning of honest faith. The Bible is full of people who wrestled.

search.title: You're searching?
search.text: Maybe you don't even know what for. That's perfectly fine. BibleBot helps you ask the right questions – instead of delivering quick answers.

deepen.title: You want to go deeper?
deepen.text: You already believe, but want to understand more? Discover the depth of the Bible – historical, personal, surprisingly relevant.

discover.quote: "Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened."
discover.quoteText: Many of us don't talk much about faith. That's okay. But those with questions deserve honest answers – without sermons, without membership, without ulterior motives.

faq.title: What you should know about BibleBot
faq.subtitle: Transparency matters – especially for theologians, pastors, and critical thinkers.
faq.q1: What makes BibleBot different from ChatGPT & Co.?
q1BotItems: Promotes critical thinking as faith maturity
faq.q2Intro: BibleBot works ecumenically with the major German-language Bible editions:
faq.q2Outro: All Bible passages include source citations and historical context.
faq.q3: What scientific foundations are behind it?
faq.q3Intro: The companionship is based on peer-reviewed research in Positive Psychology:
faq.q4: How does BibleBot ensure pastoral safety?
q4Items: Suicidal thoughts or crisis → immediate referral to emergency helplines
Respect without arbitrariness – clear biblical positions are taken
Empathy AND honesty – uncomfortable topics are addressed
Follow-up questions for self-reflection instead of cheap validation
No toxic positivity – genuine, honest companionship
Openly names tensions and difficult texts
faq.q5: Is BibleBot tied to a specific denomination?
faq.q5Answer: No. BibleBot is ecumenically oriented and respects Reformed, Catholic, Free Church, and other Christian traditions equally. When there are denominational differences in interpretation, various perspectives are presented transparently – without favoring any tradition.
faq.q6: Does BibleBot replace pastoral care or therapy?
faq.q6Answer: No. BibleBot is a digital tool for personal Bible reading and reflection. It does not replace professional pastoral care, theological counseling, or psychological therapy. In serious crises, BibleBot always refers to qualified resources.
faq.q7Answer: No. BibleBot comforts where comfort is needed – but it also challenges. Spiritual growth requires friction. BibleBot asks uncomfortable follow-up questions, names difficult Bible texts (Job, Lament Psalms, prophetic criticism), and doesn't shy away from topics like justice, repentance, and responsibility. The prophetic tradition was never comfortable – and neither is BibleBot.
faq.q8: Who is behind BibleBot and how is it funded?
faq.q8Answer: BibleBot.Life is a private, non-commercial project. It's run on a volunteer basis and funded exclusively through voluntary donations. There's no advertising, no data sales, and no paid features. All donations go directly to covering operating costs (infrastructure, hosting, development). Since BibleBot is a private project, donations are not tax-deductible.
faq.q9: How does BibleBot handle my data?
faq.q9Answer: BibleBot stores no personal data and no chat histories. Every conversation is anonymous. There's no login, no tracking, and no sharing of data with third parties. Usage is completely anonymous.

donate.title: Help keep BibleBot free
donate.subtitle: BibleBot is a passion project – no ads, no subscriptions, no hidden costs. To keep it that way, I rely on voluntary donations. Every contribution helps cover the ongoing costs for operations and infrastructure.
donate.note: BibleBot.Life is operated as a private project. Donations are therefore not tax-deductible.

cta.title: You don't have to go through this alone
cta.subtitle: Just tell BibleBot what's on your mind. No login, no cost, no judgment – just honest companionship and the wisdom of the Bible.

footer.tagline: Your personal companion for a life with the Bible
footer.disclaimer: BibleBot.Life is a digital tool and does not replace professional pastoral care, theological counseling, or psychological therapy. In acute crises, please contact your local emergency helpline.
footer.love: With ❤️ for everyone wondering what Christ thinks.

chat.welcome:
Welcome! 🤗

I'm your BibleBot – your personal companion with the Bible, good questions, and real impulses. No pressure, no judgment.

You can ask me anything – or just share what's on your mind. 💛
chat.journeyOffer:
💡 **Tip:** I also offer a **21-day journey** – 3 weeks of daily impulses, reflections, and concrete steps. At your own pace.

Would you like to try it?

refer.whatsappMsg: Hey, I wanted to show you BibleBot – a free Bible companion that really knows the Bible and asks great questions. No login, anonymous, honest. Try it out: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=whatsapp 💛

refer.emailBody:
Hi!

I wanted to show you BibleBot – a free Bible companion that really knows the Bible. No sign-up needed, completely anonymous.

It asks thoughtful questions, explains Bible passages in context and accompanies you honestly – even on difficult topics.

Try it out: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=email

Best wishes
